# Varun Mahajan — AI Portfolio

> Lead Experience Engineer with 14+ years in Next.js, React, TypeScript, and Node.js. Based in Ontario, Canada. Open to Staff Engineer, Principal Engineer, or hands-on Engineering Manager roles.

This is an AI-powered interactive portfolio. Visitors can ask the AI questions about Varun's experience, projects, skills, and contact information.

## Key Pages

- [Home](https://varunmahajan.tech): Introduction and quick-access topic cards
- [AI Chat](https://varunmahajan.tech/chat): Conversational interface — ask anything about Varun's work

## About Varun Mahajan

Varun Mahajan is a Lead Experience Engineer at Publicis Sapient, Toronto. He has led frontend engineering for enterprise clients including UHG Optum and Loblaw Digital, delivering AI-powered tools, eCommerce platforms, and payment SDKs at scale.

**Current Role:** Lead Experience Engineer, Publicis Sapient (June 2018 – Present)

**Key Projects:**
- Optum Contract Analysis Tool (CAT) — AI-powered PDF contract analysis using OpenAI, Next.js, Python
- Medicare M3P Payment SDK — Micro-frontend payment SDK for Medicare prescription plans
- JoeFresh eCommerce Re-platform (Loblaw Digital) — +20% conversion, +10% AOV
- Loblaw In-Store Fulfillment Tool — Deployed to all Loblaw stores across Canada

**Core Skills:**
- Frontend: Next.js, React, TypeScript, Redux, GraphQL
- Backend: Node.js, Express, Spring Boot, MySQL, MongoDB
- DevOps: Kubernetes, Docker, Azure, GitLab CI/CD, GitHub CI/CD
- AI: OpenAI, Vector DB, LangChain, Python

**Education:** B.Tech in Electronics and Communication Engineering, UPTU Lucknow

**Availability:** Open to work. Permanent Resident — Canada.

**Contact:** mhjn.varun@gmail.com

## Technology Stack (This Site)

This portfolio is built with:
- Next.js 16 (App Router)
- TypeScript, Tailwind CSS v4, Framer Motion
- LangChain + configurable LLM providers (Groq, OpenAI, Anthropic, Ollama)
- Upstash Redis for portfolio data persistence
- Vercel Blob for resume storage
- WCAG 2.1 AA accessible
